reviews.text: Dr. Kapoor is pleasant and I do like her. However, I don't think she listens very well/is thorough. Earlier during my appointment with her, she asked if I would take fish oil and I responded that I did not want to take any products with fish. She ended up recommending, among other supplements, one supplement containing fish. Trusting that she had taken all my dietary preferences into account before making her recommendations, I bought all the supplements she recommended for me, including the one with fish. It was only after I opened the supplement and smelled it that I realized it had fish in it. The appointments with Dr. Kapoor are expensive, and the supplements cost a lot, too. And many of the supplements cannot be returned once opened. I'm disappointed because I expected that Dr. Kapoor would take my dietary preferences into consideration before making her supplement recommendations, which is a very reasonable expectation. I later had to reach out to her, asking her for a vegan or vegetarian substitute for the supplement.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJW6zSyr7xokRqz5lkt2pjq8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KM2RVSmZWVkpPV204NFlsOVBjRjlYTWxCblJHYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Kapoor was very easy to talk to and she listened to me.  She was willing to look at possible treatments I brought her but also explain why she didn't think some would work for me.  I didn't feel like she had a cookie-cutter approach for all patients, but rather was making recommendations based on my specific issues.  It is also refreshing to find a doctor who has knowledge about and is willing to attempt to treat Long Covid--after 5 years this is the first time I've felt at all optimistic with a medical professional for this problem.

reviews.text: When I started this program 37 days ago I reached a point where modern medicine couldn't diagnose why I was gradually gaining weight and I knew I never fully lost the weight I gained from having twins 19 years ago. We discussed my results of the quiz and she presented some options and I decided to start with their creams. My hot flashes, night sweats, irritability, and everything else are gone! reviews.name: places/ChIJH54X70iLNIgRp8HqNDWv1QY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xJek4zaERMVlpRTjJ0SFIyeGFiamRxY0RCUFJHYxAB
reviews.text:
BeBalanced is life changing! In February, I started my health journey with BeBalanced. I was struggling with sleeping issues, anxiety, thyroid issues, low energy levels, being overweight, and overall not feeling my best. As a mom of two young boys it is important to me to feel my best so that I can enjoy each day with them. I took the chance and decided to give BeBalanced a try. BeBalanced has been a life changing experience. After just the first month ALL my issues were resolved! I was getting good quality sleep, my anxiety was gone, my hormones were balanced (which resolved my thyroid issues), I felt like I had more energy, and I lost 24 pounds (in the first month alone). Overall, thus far, I have lost 60 POUNDS which is mind blowing! What is even more mind blowing is that I didn’t exercise one time.

BeBalanced helped me balance my hormones so that I could not only lose weight but maintain feeling my best. I have finally gained my confidence back after having my children. I also gained valuable life changing knowledge about how foods effect my body, how my body processes particular foods, and what foods trigger inflammation in my body. This information is key to maintaining my goal weight and to continue to feel my best.

Overall, my health journey with BeBalanced has been an amazing experience so far. The moment you walk in the door for your first consultation to the mid-day random question you need answered at any time my health coach TommiAnn is always there to LISTEN and help me. I need to share a few things about my health coach TommiAnn. She is very supportive, knowledgeable, helpful, kind, understanding, and most importantly motivating. I truly believe that if I didn’t have such an amazing coach like her I would have not been so successful. I highly recommend BeBalanced to everyone (especially women).

reviews.text:
I had my very first visit to GameDay Men’s Health today, and I’m already so glad I made the appointment. I’ve been feeling low energy, less drive, and just not like myself lately, so I decided to check out their free testosterone assessment.
From the moment I walked in, the vibe was welcoming and relaxed—think comfortable lounge chairs, big TVs, and cold drinks instead of a sterile waiting room. The staff greeted me right away and made me feel at ease immediately.
Everyone I interacted with was incredibly friendly, professional, and genuinely informative. They took time to explain the whole process, walked me through the blood draw (quick and painless), and went over my results on the spot. The clinician was patient, answered every question I had without rushing, and never made me feel pressured into anything. It felt like a real conversation about my health rather than a sales pitch.
Even though it was just day one, I left feeling hopeful and well-informed. The whole experience was smooth, respectful, and exactly what I needed to start addressing my symptoms. If you’re on the fence about checking out GameDay Men’s Health, go for it—the staff made my first visit outstanding!
Highly recommend!

reviews.text: If you are debating whether TRT is right for you or looking for the best local clinic (like I was 1 year ago). Stop looking and set up an appointment at Gameday. No strings. No pressure. FREE BLOODWORK.  All the info, options, and your personal health standing with no obligation. If you are suffering from symptoms of low T and just want proof that you’re not going crazy, just go. If you’re over 30 you’re most likely not where you should or could be.  You’ll meet with Sara to go over your bloodwork. She is INCREDIBLE. I hate going to my PCP, I never go. I’m never comfortable. I actually love going to Gameday. From my first meeting with Sara I felt super comfortable. She actually listens, understands, and wants you to be better. Her door is always open. I have never once regretted starting therapy.  The entire staff is awesome. The owner himself is regularly there and is a great guy.  I always leave there in a better mood than when I walked in. When I started my T level were around 500. I’ve been living around 850-900 for a year now.  I sleep like a baby, libido is through the roof, and after a year in the gym with no gains, I’ve put on about 20lbs of muscle over the last year.  I feel 25 again. Thank you Sara and staff!

reviews.name: places/ChIJs4ZVi524xokRzpxriX62nuM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCR1p6YzBORGRmZWpOelVXUjBWRlF3U0ZKdU5rRRAB
reviews.text:
Going anonymous here. This doctor does not take women’s sexual health seriously. He will just tell you it is all in your head. Seeing him was a waste of money and time. He told me: “Your brain is your sex organ.” “Your testosterone is high enough, that’s why you have acne on your face.” “You need to explore your body… males have been doing it since they could, but not girls.” I don’t know where you men get this from because this is incorrect. This is so unprofessional. There is no excuse. He acted like I have been living under a rock my whole life. Dr. Gittens, stop spreading lies to women and take them seriously. You should look up who Jessica Pin is and follow her on social media because I am not convinced you know much about clitoral anatomy. Much of clitoral anatomy was omitted from medical literature. Women deserve better care than this.

Your ignorance is contributing to the continuation of disregard for female sexual function in the medical field. People like you who claim to be top docs for sexual function for both genders need to do something. There are so many penile imaging protocols and tests that are established and covered by insurance, and none for the clitoris because doctors like you don’t even try (no matter how desperate the patient is) even though they CAN be done. There are women out there who have to suffer without answers because doctors like you will just blame it on distress and not do anything about it.

Edit:
Thank you for your response. I am a patient, and I chose to remain anonymous to protect my privacy. During my visit, Dr. Gittens told me that my hymen was “still intact,” implying that being in a relationship would solve all of my problems. The hymen does not have anything to do with sexual function, and this comment felt very outdated and dismissive. Instead of focusing primarily on emotional distress, he could have asked questions or informed me about other physiological factors, such as engorgement or nerve pathways.

My review accurately reflects my experience with Dr. Gittens. My experience clearly highlights a serious issue, which is systemic disregard for female sexual function in medicine.

reviews.text:
The Hormone Center is saving my life.

For my entire life I have been told I was fat and that the only solution was diet and exercise. Well, I tried that. What's crazy is I had been diagnosed with Hashimoto's and was showing distinct symptoms of PCOS as early as 8 years old, but no doctors believed me.

When I moved to Pittsburgh I wanted to look for a doctor who would manage my thyroid not as a singular organ but as a whole body issue. I was not expecting them to do everything. But the Hormone Center does that- everything. I consider them to be the most important physicians on my care team and all other opinions defer to them.

I still have a very long way to go on my health journey, but that is because the folks here believe in doing things in the healthiest way possible. They will not wreck my body in the name of faster results. And they will not toss me aside when I'm "better" because they know and understand that my conditions are lifelong and need to be monitored for the rest of my life.

I started seeing them at the beginning of this year and my life has significantly improved. I am able to play with my nephews again, I can breathe, I was finally able to conquer depression, and most importantly, they believed me about my weight. They figured out that I have insulin resistance and that is why I can't lose weight. They have been treating me for it and for the first time in my life I'm actually losing weight!!! I have lost nearly 30 lbs this year and I'm confident that I could lose another 10 before new years.

I understand that the price may make you reconsider, but if you have the funds, I urge you to ask yourself: what is the cost of having a better life?

I do not regret a single penny paid and I'm so glad to finally reclaim my personhood, with their expert help.

reviews.text:
I am 52 years old. I followed hormone therapy for quite a few years, and was unsure if I would ever pull the proverbial trigger.

After contracting and suffering from long covid for 5 years, I felt I was at a standstill in my recovery and was desperate to reclaim my life. I decided it was time to contact a specialist and consider my options for TRT.

The initial consultation went well. Everyone seemed friendly and knowledgeable.  We agreed on a treatment and moved forward.

SH&HC took care of all the bells & whistles. I received everything I needed to get started within a week.

I noticed a difference in my energy level almost immediately. Over the next two months, I had significant fat loss without losing (and actually gaining some) muscle mass. I am 8 months out, still have the increases energy level, continue to have positive results, have zero regrets, and the treatment has exceeded my expectations.

I have to give a shout out to their Customer Service. From day one, she has been knowledgeable, courteous, and     expeditious with every question and/or concern I have had.

I would recommend SH&HC to anyone looking to improve their quality of life.

Before steel health I developed a lot of inflammation in my joints and it was very painful it took me 10 minutes to put my socks and shoes on in the . I would go to the gym one day a week and it would take me a week to recover it took a few weeks for me to start noticing inflammation going down and having more energy and before I knew it they got my testosterone levels right where they needed to be. I weigh 205 now lost a lot of fat and gained a good amount of muscle the inflammation is gone now I work out 6 days a week, I have clean eating habits and I feel like I'm 25 years old.  Tracie the office manager is always texting me ever since the beginning of this journey checking in on me setting and up my medicals. This lady is on top of everything I can't thank Tracie and Steel Health enough for the quality of life I have today

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0yMDu5O_yIkR_kYkBP_7a-o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkb1ZuRjZlazVzWlZKQmR5MURiMTk2YlROUVRFRRAB
reviews.text:
Admittedly was a good experience at first, felt heard and seen as an individual but I realized they never gave me my labs back to view & I just took their word on what they were. I was told my levels were good & to forgo the 3 month checkup for a 6 month checkup.

After feeling pretty weird & having issues within my life I requested my labs only to find out that my testosterone & estrogen were rapidly rising & at very high levels when they said I was fine and to just come back in 6 months.

If my testosterone levels are 200 in January, 900 in March and 1250 in July along with rising estrogen and hematocrit, why on earth would they not retest me for 6 months?

That’s borderline negligent.

Upon explaining this to them they told me I’d need to come in and get my bloodwork drawn which would cost $200 because you pay $200 a year for lab work and my year is up now.

I can only assume this is a tactic to save money at the expense of their patients, tell your patient they’re fine so they don’t require/ask for more labs to be done.

No apologies were given, nobody seemed to care when I brought it to their attention, I specifically asked for some reassurance that something like this wouldn’t happen again and none was given.

Save your time & pay the extra money to go to a provider that cares about your wellbeing.

reviews.text:
I had a very disappointing experience at GameDay Men’s Health. From the start, the service felt rushed and impersonal. The staff didn’t take much time to listen to my concerns and seemed more focused on selling treatments than actually understanding my health needs.

The consultation felt like a sales pitch rather than a medical discussion. Pricing wasn’t clearly explained upfront, and I felt pressured to commit to treatments before I fully understood the costs or whether they were even necessary.

Communication from the clinic was also lacking, and getting clear follow-up information was frustrating.

Overall, the experience felt more like a business transaction than a patient-centered healthcare visit. I would recommend doing a lot of research and considering other options before choosing this clinic.

reviews.text: BeBalanced went above and beyond my greatness expectations!!!! I lost 41 pounds and have kept the weight off for over four months. I was honestly shocked my by results!!! This program is detailed, organized, supportive and true to their mission which leads to amazing results. Questions and discussions are welcomed and encouraged. The relationship I had with my coach, Dotti, was always open, honest, informative and real. This relationship was definitely key to my success. This is a lifestyle changing program that positively impacts your physical and mental health in both external and internal ways that are critical and beneficial to a longer, healthier and happier life. #BeBalancedlifechanging!

reviews.name: places/ChIJrVpKRUHBNIgRlaCReSJUv8Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WM2FFbFVXRTlXYUROUFNqSXdXRTV3YWxkNlZIYxAB
reviews.text: I had a great experience at BeBalanced. I was not sure this program was for me, as I’m too young for menopause and don’t have any hormonal issues. Just wanted to lose weight and feel better. I was reassured I was in the right place! The program is challenging for sure, but those challenges lead you to thinking about your previous food choices and how they impact your body and your overall health. By eating real food and foregoing processed, it is amazing how you start to feel better - I did not even realize that my “normal” was actually not that great of a feeling until I started removing things from my diet. I lost 18 pounds doing one round of the program. The correlation of weight loss and feeling better as you power through the difficult times will help you reach the end of the program feeling very accomplished. I would recommend this program to anyone wanting to understand and improve their health naturally.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrVpKRUHBNIgRlaCReSJUv8Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pONlduZzVPR1pJVDA5SGFtNWxUbk0zY25WblRGRRAB
reviews.text:
If you're skeptical of this program, like I was, I would say 1,000% get over that fear and sign up for this journey.  I am in the last year of my 30's and have an extremely stressful job.  Cortisol and weight gain are/were my number 1 reasons for joining. No matter what I did over the last 5 years, the weight would not come off and I slowly kept crawling up the scale, year by year - pound by pound.  I did crossfit, running, carnivore diet, low carb diet, sugar free diet, etc etc etc...

A friend of mine did this program and recommended it to me after I asked her what changed in her life to look so good.  She told me this program which was recommended to her by her mother.

After speaking with Amy at Be Balanced numerous times before signing up, I felt like, "what do I have to lose aside from money?" -  "I have to keep trying until something works".  This was my thought process because I was on the brink of doing a GLP, metformin or HERS.  I am so so so glad I did not have to resort to any of those meds and did this clean, natural balance instead.

I lost 15lbs on my 5'1 frame and feel incredible.  The bloating, inflammation, stress, etc has all decreased.  I love this program for making strides in de-stressing not with just supplements but with other tools. It sounds woo woo but the meditation and learning to just sit and be grateful was helpful.

Amy - you truly are a fantastic coach, wonderful person to work with and encouraging.  I hope I don't have to come back but if I do, I know I am requesting & trusting Amy to my plan.  Talking to her was easy and she provided helpful, reasonable solutions when I got stuck.

I admit, I don't know how this all worked and some of it made my eyes roll but the jokes on me. It all was useful and helpful and I still listen to evening meditations to wind down.  Take charge of your health. Sign up with Be Balanced - you will NOT regret it.

reviews.text: My experience with the Moday Center over the last year has been excellent. It is refreshing to find doctors who really care about the root cause of my issues and who think outside of the box and aren’t just looking for a band aid to put on the problem. The communication has been fantastic throughout my program and it has been extremely comforting to know that when I send them a message via their portal system I can always expect a response within a day or so.  I would highly recommend checking out the Moday Center for functional medicine.

The supplements Dr. Moday added to my health regimen address my specific needs, and I have seen a marked improvement in my energy level, mood, and overall well being.  I whole-heartedly recommend the Moday Center for anyone looking for an improvement in their health under the care of a doctor who is willing to uncover the root cause of illness as opposed to just masking symptoms.  Thank you Dr. Heather Moday and the Moday Center staff--you are the best!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUcicazfGxokRfx0jbdTq908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwdnF6TmRREAE
reviews.text: I originally started working with Dr. Moday a few years past( I am now 72),as I was experiencing ongoing bouts of gastrointestinal issues, fatigue, headaches etc.Through careful testing and analysis she was able to identify and diagnose various causes for my medical issues. My quality of life was greatly diminished from the ongoing fungal issue. Dr. Moday has addressed the issue successfully and I am able to move on with my regular life. Dr. Moday is an excellent physician with superb diagnostic skills, expertise, and knowledge. I am very grateful that I found Dr. Moday !!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUcicazfGxokRfx0jbdTq908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnazVyTEtBEAE

Kristie, the receptionist is incredibly helpful and always has a great energy. It is a unique experience to take part in healing your body from the inside out using the latest science and technology. I am so grateful I invested in my future.

reviews.text:
TRUE REJUVENATION IS TRUE HEALTH CARE!

When I first came in, my testosterone was in the mid-400s. Every other provider told me, “You’re in the normal range, nothing to worry about.”
But I knew something was off — low energy, low drive, not showing up the way I wanted to physically, mentally, or emotionally.

From the very first conversation, I could tell this was going to be a therapeutic alliance, not just a prescription. Catherine actually listened. She explained things clearly. She connected dots that no one else bothered to look at. She broke down the difference between “normal” and optimal, and how that would affect my goals and my life.

I’ll never forget her saying:

“You’re going to get leaner and stronger with testosterone when we dial it in. You will have to make some lifestyle changes no doubt, but you won’t have to starve yourself, workout excessively or obsess about the scale.”
As a Latino dude who’s been on the chronic yo-yo diet cycle for years, that hit different.

Fast-forward 5+ years:
I’m leaner, stronger, more confident, and performing better in every single area — family life, resistance training, work, mindset, and overall energy.

And here’s the real-life test:
I’m a dad of three kids with a very busy schedule. It is quite difficult to get 7-9 hours of sleep every night or eat clean ever meal. But I still have the energy to play with them, keep up with them, and actually be present. That alone would’ve been worth it.

But then you know things have really changed when your wife looks at you and goes:
“What's up with your hot dad bod? And how are you getting more vascular as you get closer to 40?”
That’s when it hits you — this isn’t just TRT. This is transformation done right.

Catherine is phenomenal. Her exceptional patient education facilitates my continually learning from her in depth knowledge and hyper niche skill set.  Her Team is so supportive and are on top of the things.  For instance, they had my updated script to the local Blood Bank for a donation over the same day which was amazing!

For my men over 30 in Erie, If you feel “off,” or you’ve been told your Test levels are “normal,” but you don’t feel normal… seriously consider this health investment.

One of the best decisions I’ve ever made for my health, my family, and future.

reviews.text: As a nurse, I am very critical of weight loss programs because I need to understand/ agree with the science.  This has been by far, the best program that I have used.  I lost 24 pounds since July, and feel so much better.  I have not had reflux or hot flashes since starting.  My cholesterol and triglycerides were horrendous last January. I was facing more cholesterol medications because my doctor did not think that diet alone would bring my numbers down enough.  My labs were drawn again in September and all my numbers are normal now.  That is objective proof that this works for me!  Feeling better and looking better can be subjective--- labs though, and the scale is not!  This is a holistic sensible way to modify your life in ways that not only make sense and work but are sustainable.  My whole relationship with food is improved, and the control I feel over my health is wonderful!  If you are ready to make the changes and feel the results--- this is a wonderful way to do that.  My advice is to do it exactly as they say.  Do not play mind games with yourself and think that you can pick and choose from the program.  The support is there, so give yourself a chance to see the results by following the plan the way it is set up and trust the process.  I am so grateful that I did!! The West Chester team is amazing--- they are very supportive and helpful.  They definitely set you up for success.

reviews.text: I’ve been on HRT for almost 2 years and recently moved across the country from an area that has some of the best HRT doctors in the country. Jenna is amazing, she genuinely listens and addresses things that my old HRT doc never even considered or explained. And it’s not just me, Jenna also did the same for my husband, who is on TRT. As a new resident and not knowing where anything is, I did countless google searches and was worried I wouldn’t find a good HRT doctor. I was wrong, I found one that was BETTER than my old one, who was well renowned in the area where I lived! I cannot recommend RV enough. They’re totally worth the time and money and I will never go with anyone else now. I have a lot of friends who use online providers like Midi, who tout that blood tests aren’t necessary, which is true to a certain extent. A lot of my Midi friends suffer mentally and physically when their hormones fluctuate wildly. Then they google their own symptoms or run to me because I take blood tests that confirm my symptoms and they compare their symptoms to mine. RV is the full package…blood tests, symptoms, and thorough exams. So I also recommend RV over online providers also.
